name: Email Classification
description: Phase 0 – Classifies unclassified raw emails using Claude API. Trigger: scheduled (hourly) or webhook. Queries raw_emails where classification IS NULL, calls Claude to classify (client, supplier, internal), updates the record, and logs to workflow_logs.
notes: Placeholder – build this workflow in the n8n UI and export the JSON here. See Phase 0 Build Manual section 6.2 for details.
